agents.subtitle: Aggregates claude/codex running in ghostty terminals + tmux sessions spawned by the dashboard. Spawn / kill in PR-17b, live output in PR-17c.

card.stop_ghostty_hint: Close in the ghostty terminal window (Cmd+W)
card.stop_confirm_body: This kills the backend tmux session — any running claude / task is lost. The linked PR/issue connection is removed too. Confirm?
card.summary_ghostty_hint: Cannot read ghostty terminal contents; check the ghostty window directly
card.view_terminal_ghostty_hint: Ghostty terminals are private to the user. The dashboard cannot read their output. Please check the corresponding ghostty window directly.

agents.empty: No agents running. Open claude in a ghostty tab and it appears within seconds.

modal.step1_label_field: Label (a short name to recognize later)
modal.step1_label_placeholder: e.g. Build an Excel export feature
modal.step1_prompt_placeholder: What do you want done? Goal, purpose, constraints. The agent will use /req to clarify before writing a plan.
modal.step1_help: The agent won't start coding right away — it'll first use /req to clarify your need, then write a plan. You'll approve the plan with a 'Go' button before execution begins.
modal.step2_pane_waiting: Agent is starting... (output will appear here)
modal.step2_input_placeholder: Reply to the agent or refine your need (Cmd+Enter to send)
modal.step2_help: Agent output streams live (SSE). When clarification is done, the agent outputs ### PLAN READY ### to unlock Next.
modal.step2_keep_running_hint: Closing the modal won't stop the agent. You'll find it in the agents list afterwards.
modal.step2_next_disabled: Wait until agent outputs ### PLAN READY ### to proceed
modal.step3_plan_missing: (No plan markdown found in pane — agent may not have output a ```markdown ... ``` block yet)
modal.step3_help: Review the plan. If it looks good, click "Go" and the agent will execute task-by-task. Click Back to keep chatting in Step 2.
modal.step4_running_hint: Agent is executing the plan. Progress shows in the pane above.
modal.step4_done_hint: Agent finished. After closing, you can find it in the Agents list.
modal.step4_help: The agent keeps outputting to the pane while running. Closing the modal doesn't stop the agent.

court_runtime.subtitle: Existing dashboard moved into this menu. Orchestrator health / pending approvals / watcher / receiver / tmux all live here.
